objective: Stop broad negative source scans and convert MainRegimeV2 evidence work into a source-window label factory with explicit crosswalk gates.

active_taxonomy.rule: Child labels such as expansion, stress, liquidity, and thin/session conditions remain provenance only unless mapped through a parent-root source-window or direct-event gate.

pivot_reason.failure_mode: Recent loops repeatedly searched for prepackaged public datasets and mostly produced accepted=0 negative audits.
pivot_reason.new_direction: Use primary-source dated windows where they exist, create a compact source-window table, then require owner-approved projection/crosswalk before attaching those windows to provider/instrument/timeframe slots.

source_seeds.positive_value: Provides dated S&P 500 bull and bear market windows rather than model-generated hidden states.
hard_limits: Does not provide direct Manipulation rows.
Cross-instrument projection to SPY, ES, QQQ, NQ, single names, or crypto needs an explicit owner-approved crosswalk.
The 2022-10-12 bull window is open-ended in the inspected PDF and needs a current-source refresh before live use.

source_seeds.positive_value: Provides official peak-to-trough contraction windows and machine-readable source links for crisis/macro-stress supervision.
hard_limits: Macro contraction is not identical to market drawdown.
Projection to instrument/timeframe labels needs an explicit crisis crosswalk.
Does not provide Bull, Bear, Sideways, or Manipulation labels.

source_seeds.positive_value: Defines a defensible bull/bear dating algorithm for owner-approved derived labels.
hard_limits: Algorithm output remains derived/model/protocol evidence, not an independent source-label panel, unless the owner explicitly approves it as the label factory.

source_seeds.positive_value: Confirms Sideways should be modeled as non-trending/range-bound, not as a child of Bull or Bear.
hard_limits: Cannot by itself accept Sideways slots.
Requires either a source-window provider or an owner-approved range-window adjudication protocol.

label_factory_contract.purpose: Keep compact, dated primary-source windows in repo while raw source material stays external.

label_factory_contract.required_decision: Owner must approve or reject each projection such as SPX source window -> SPY/ES/QQQ/NQ/intraday labels.
Find a dated range-bound source or approve a deterministic range-window adjudication protocol; do not silently use OHLCV proxies as independent labels.
Attach only source-window rows with approved instrument/timeframe projection and provenance fields.

next_non_negative_loop.name: mainregimev2_source_window_attachability_v1
next_non_negative_loop.success_metric: number of approved provider/instrument/timeframe/root slots attachable without model-generated labels
next_non_negative_loop.expected_positive_path: Bull/Bear/Crisis seed windows first; Sideways requires separate source or owner-adjudication before acceptance.
